failure.message: TypeError: string indices must be integers, not 'str'

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.qml.test_canonical_routes.TestNavigationBridge object at 0x7fd3cd1ebd50> routes = ({'home': {'title': 'Inicio', 'source': '../pages/home/HomePage.qml', 'category': 'core', 'status': 'functional'}, 'li......}, {'playback': 'playback.nowplaying', 'assistant': 'ai', 'eq': 'equalizer', 'metadata_inspector': 'metadata', ...})
def test_navigation_bridge_resolves_aliases(self, routes): from ui_qml_bridge.navigation_bridge import NavigationBridge ROUTES, ALIASES = routes nav = NavigationBridge() for alias, info in ALIASES.items(): resolved = nav._resolve(alias) > target = info["alias_of"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: string indices must be integers, not 'str'
tests/qml/test_canonical_routes.py:128: TypeError

testcase.name: test_baseline_sha_matches_head

failure.message:
AssertionError: Baseline SHA cff1d372b316f4f4e2e149510ece02d2f660ccca != HEAD a73722aa3f7f1a1544918afd638074763737667b assert 'cff1d372b316...e02d2f660ccca' == 'a73722aa3f7f...074763737667b'
- a73722aa3f7f1a1544918afd638074763737667b + cff1d372b316f4f4e2e149510ece02d2f660ccca

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.qml.test_evidence_v5_baseline.TestShaConsistency object at 0x7fd3ccf3e5d0> baseline = {'sha': 'cff1d372b316f4f4e2e149510ece02d2f660ccca', 'python_version': '3.11.15', 'pyside_version': '6.11.1', 'qt_version': '6.11.1', ...} head_sha = 'a73722aa3f7f1a1544918afd638074763737667b'
def test_baseline_sha_matches_head(self, baseline, head_sha): > assert baseline.get("sha") == head_sha, f"Baseline SHA {baseline.get('sha')} != HEAD {head_sha}" E AssertionError: Baseline SHA cff1d372b316f4f4e2e149510ece02d2f660ccca != HEAD a73722aa3f7f1a1544918afd638074763737667b E assert 'cff1d372b316...e02d2f660ccca' == 'a73722aa3f7f...074763737667b' E E - a73722aa3f7f1a1544918afd638074763737667b E + cff1d372b316f4f4e2e149510ece02d2f660ccca
tests/qml/test_evidence_v5_baseline.py:62: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_evidence_sha_matches_head

failure.message:
AssertionError: Evidence SHA cff1d372b316f4f4e2e149510ece02d2f660ccca != HEAD a73722aa3f7f1a1544918afd638074763737667b assert 'cff1d372b316...e02d2f660ccca' == 'a73722aa3f7f...074763737667b'
- a73722aa3f7f1a1544918afd638074763737667b + cff1d372b316f4f4e2e149510ece02d2f660ccca

self = <tests.qml.test_qml_bridges.TestAlbumGrid object at 0x7fd3cced9a90>
